The mutant will attempt to concatenate a tensor of shape [16,64,output_length,1] (output.unsqueeze(-1)) with a tensor of shape [16,64,output_length] (indices without unsqueeze). This is a dimension mismatch: torch::cat requires all tensors to have the same number of dimensions, and all dimensions except the concatenation dimension must match. The concatenation dimension is -1 (last). So we have one tensor with 4 dimensions and another with 3 dimensions. This will cause a runtime error.
